text: All I have left is an expressionless face, my gaze is as tough as a monolith, only perseverance remains in my heart.
author: Fang Yuan

text: Because hardships strengthen resolve, the strong-minded will not be lured by worldly affairs. Today I step on grass; later I shall step on mountains and rivers!
author: Fang Yuan

text: If the whole world wants revenge, I will exterminate the whole world! If someone succeeds in taking revenge against me, that just means I was not strong enough.
author: Fang Yuan

text: Humans only live for a hundred years, it is as unreal as a dream that ends in an instant... In this world, only eternal life is worth pursuing!
author: Fang Yuan

text: Fate controls the weak. The strong control fate.
author: Fang Yuan

text: In this world, there are no permanent enemies, only permanent benefits.
author: Fang Yuan

text: Even if I fail and die in the end, I will have no regrets because I walked the path of my own choosing.
author: Fang Yuan

text: A person's heart is like a mirror; if it is dirty, clean it; if it is broken, throw it away.
author: Fang Yuan

text: Do not speak of justice and evil. In this world, winner takes all, and the loser is always in the wrong.
author: Fang Yuan

text: What is the meaning of living if you only care about what others think of you?
author: Fang Yuan

text: We are saving ourselves, not being saviors.
author: Klein Moretti

text: We are guardians, but also a bunch of miserable wretches that are constantly fighting against dangers and madness.
author: Dunn Smith

text: I won't lose too much, just myself. There are always some things that are more important than others.
author: Klein Moretti

text: The oldest and strongest emotion of mankind is fear, and the oldest and strongest fear is the fear of the unknown.
author: Klein Moretti

text: I'm just a traveler who's passing by. I'm just a clown who's performing a show.
author: The Fool / Klein Moretti

text: The price of a smile is sometimes a drop of blood, sometimes a lifetime of tears.
author: Leonard Mitchell

text: Only when you are prepared to bear the weight of a crown can you wear it.
author: Klein Moretti

text: Every secret holds danger, and every path towards power is paved with madness.
author: Klein Moretti

text: History is written by the victors, but the truth is buried in the fog of time.
author: The Fool

text: In the face of absolute despair, even a clown's smile can become the most terrifying weapon.
author: Klein Moretti

text: What I am looking for is passion. I hope you have the passion to see the end of this damn story with me.
author: Kim Dokja

text: If I was really a god, then I would be the most helpless god in the world who knew everything but couldn't explain anything.
author: Kim Dokja

text: Tell me, you fool. If I continue to regress, will I ever get to meet you again?
author: Yoo Joonghyuk

text: I was an ordinary person with ordinary skills. But even so, this didn't mean I could only do ordinary things.
author: Kim Dokja

text: We are companions separated by life and death.
author: Kim Dokja

text: It was a story that only I knew, a story that only I could read.
author: Kim Dokja

text: A story doesn't end just because it stops. It only ends when the reader stops reading.
author: Han Sooyoung

text: There are some walls that cannot be climbed, but they can still be broken.
author: Yoo Joonghyuk

text: Even if the scenario is destined to destroy us, I will write a different ending.
author: Kim Dokja

text: If you don't save anyone, you won't lose anyone either. But you will end up alone in the dark.
author: Kim Dokja

text: If the system wants me to fight, I'll fight. If it wants me to become stronger, I'll become stronger.
author: Sung Jin-Woo

text: Arise.
author: Sung Jin-Woo

text: The hunters became the prey. And the prey... became the god.
author: Sung Jin-Woo

text: Do not look back. There is nothing left for you in the past.
author: Sung Jin-Woo

text: If you are weak, you die. That is the simple truth of the dungeons, and the world.
author: Sung Jin-Woo

text: If the heavens block my path, I shall shatter the heavens!
author: Li Qiye

text: Even if the cycle of reincarnation ends and the cosmos falls, I will still stand above all.
author: Li Qiye

text: In this world, nobody can dictate my fate. Not even the heavens.
author: Li Qiye

text: A million years is but a passing moment to me. I have watched empires rise and fall like dust.
author: Li Qiye

text: If God wants me to die, I will drag God down to hell with me.
author: Zephyr

text: I will tear down the throne of the gods and rebuild it in my own image.
author: Zephyr

text: To defeat a madman, you must be madder than him.
author: Yi Zaha

text: Madness is just another word for clarity in a world that has gone completely insane.
author: Yi Zaha

text: The path of Mount Hua is to look forward, never back.
author: Chung Myung
source: Return of the Mount Hua Sect

text: Even if your limbs are torn, as long as your head is attached, keep moving forward.
author: Chung Myung
source: Return of the Mount Hua Sect

text: Mount Hua does not need a savior. We will save ourselves.
author: Chung Myung
source: Return of the Mount Hua Sect

text: A sword is only as sharp as the resolve of the one holding it.
author: Chung Myung
source: Return of the Mount Hua Sect

text: I will make sure my enemies regret ever being born.
author: Cha Yeon-woo

text: If you try to stop me, I will destroy everything you hold dear.
author: Cha Yeon-woo

text: A sword is just a tool, but when placed in the hands of one with resolve, it can split the heavens.
author: Jin Mu-Won

text: The Northern Heavenly Sect may have fallen, but the shadow of our swords will never fade.
author: Jin Mu-Won

text: The weak are only food for the strong. This is the truth of this world.
author: Gu Changge

text: I don't care about righteousness or villainy. I only care about who stands at the very top.
author: Gu Changge

text: I'll do whatever it takes to protect those I love this time.
author: Arthur Leywin

text: If you don't want to regret, make the choice you believe in.
author: Arthur Leywin

text: True strength isn't about not feeling pain; it's about moving forward despite it.
author: Arthur Leywin

text: If the world refuses to change, I will force it to.
author: Kim Gong-ja

text: Even if I have to die ten thousand times, I will achieve a perfect ending.
author: Kim Gong-ja

text: I will love you even if the world resets, even if you forget me.
author: Raviel Ivansia

text: The only way to truly understand a monster is to become one yourself.
author: Leylin Farlier

text: I do not seek to be a hero. I only seek the path to truth and eternity.
author: Leylin Farlier

text: Emotion is a luxury that only the weak can afford to waste.
author: Leylin Farlier

text: I just want to live a peaceful slacker life, but the world keeps trying to destroy my nap time.
author: Cale Henituse

text: If you don't want to get hurt, you should have stayed out of my way.
author: Cale Henituse

text: My lord's command is my only absolute law.
author: Frankenstein

text: You no longer have the right to breathe in my presence.
author: Kadis Etrama Di Raizel

text: Overgeared is not just about items; it is about the resolve to overcome talent with pure effort.
author: Grid

text: I will show you the difference between a genius and a legend.
author: Kraugel

text: Money is the absolute power in this world. Everything else is just a decoration.
author: Weed

text: Art is great, but a warm meal is even better.
author: Weed

text: I am the architect of my own destiny, and I choose to build an empire.
author: Lloyd Frontera

text: If you think I'm a good person, you clearly haven't looked at my invoice.
author: Lloyd Frontera

text: My path is simple: kill anyone who stands in my way, protect anyone who walks behind me.
author: Xie Yan

text: If the Dao has no path for me, I shall pave a path with my own hands.
author: Wang Lin

text: I am Wang Lin. I do not fear the heavens, nor do I respect the earth.
author: Wang Lin

text: Even if the heavens collapse, I will protect the souls of my loved ones.
author: Wang Lin

text: Life is like a game of chess. If you take one wrong step, the entire game is lost.
author: Su Ming

text: I seek the truth, even if the truth leads me to my own destruction.
author: Su Ming

text: I shall seal the heavens, not because I hate them, but because they dared to restrict my freedom.
author: Meng Hao

text: My path is the Path of Freedom. No force in the cosmos can bind me.
author: Meng Hao

text: I just want to live forever. Is that so wrong?
author: Bai Xiaochun

text: When I, Bai Xiaochun, snap my fingers, even the heavens have to tremble!
author: Bai Xiaochun

text: The scariest monsters are not the ones hiding in the shadows; they are the ones pretending to be human.
author: Chen Ge

text: I am not afraid of ghosts. I am only afraid of not being able to save those who trust me.
author: Chen Ge

text: A single spark can start a prairie fire. I will be that spark.
author: Ji Ning

text: If you don't strive to reach the peak, you will only end up as a stepping stone for others.
author: Ji Ning

text: I will rewrite destiny. This time, I will not lose anyone.
author: Nie Li

text: Knowledge is the greatest weapon. With enough preparation, even a mortal can slay a god.
author: Nie Li

text: Thirty years east of the river, thirty years west of the river. Never underestimate a young man's poverty!
author: Xiao Yan

text: I will burn down the heavens if they dare to harm my family.
author: Xiao Yan

text: My goal is the sea of stars. This tiny planet is just the beginning of my journey.
author: Luo Feng

text: Only through absolute strength can we protect the human race from extinction.
author: Luo Feng

text: No matter how long the path, I will keep walking until I reach the end.
author: Linley Baruch

text: A man must have the courage to face his own destiny, even if it is paved with blood.
author: Linley Baruch

text: In this world, only power is real. Everything else is just an illusion.
author: Xiao Chen

text: If the Dao has no path, then I am the Dao.
author: Shi Hao

text: I will suppress all enemies in the world with a single hand!
author: Shi Hao

text: Even if I have to stand against the entire universe, I will not take a single step back.
author: Shi Hao

text: The heavens cannot block my eyes; the earth cannot bury my heart.
author: Jiang Chen

text: If you treat me with respect, I will return it tenfold. If you cross me, I will wipe out your entire clan.
author: Jiang Chen
